Name: Azure Web App - Delete Files
Description: Provides the ability to delete files and folders from an Azure Web App through the kudu API.

Parameters.Name: FilesList
Parameters.Label: List of Files & Folders to Delete
Parameters.HelpText: List each file/folder on a new line.

Parameters.Name: AzureAccount
Parameters.Label: Azure Account
Parameters.HelpText: Must exactly match the name of a configured Azure account.

Parameters.Name: SlotName
Parameters.Label: Slot Name
Parameters.HelpText: Optional. If you want to target a specific slot, enter it's name.

Parameters.Name: RetryAttempts
Parameters.Label: Retry Attempts
Parameters.HelpText: Number of delete attempts before failing. This should be set higher than 1, as the Azure Kudu API often fails on the first request.
